title: What character do you want to see in their own show
display_title: What character do you want to see in their own show
wikitext:
[]: What character do you want to see in their own show?             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:22 pm If you could pick one person to have their own spin-off show from Eva who would it be? Let's have fun and hear you're crazy ideas! First Up: The Misadventures of Misato Katsuragi

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:26 pm phbbbbbbbbbbbbt Ritsuko. Clearly. Her life outside of the quiet keening despair we see in the show is basically a sitcom. I bet she has a fat obnoxious neighbor that dispenses sage advice and a nerdy guy down the hall that has a huge crush on her. Search your feelings.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:31 pm The "fucking Jet Alone Guy".

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:45 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The "fucking Jet Alone Guy".

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:48 pm These two guys on the bridge right here: "Morning Bob, how're you doing?" "Heya Bill. Just same old, same old. Playing dress-up with a sentient, humanoid, alien giant on the motherfucking moon. How about you?" "Just going over reports from the day we had to put the diaper armor on it. Boy oh boy that was a tough one. I'll have to send it back to scrub the intern's inuendos out of it. Seele doesn't find it as amusing as we do." "Hmph. I think we're allowed a few jokes if they refuse to bring a shrink up here and force us to seal up a huge gaping vagina the size of a hallway." NEXT WEEK ON BILL AND BOB'S MOONSIDE ADVENTURES : Bob forgets to drain the used LCL tank and replace the filters. The story of why the bishounen test pilot stopped using the entry plug shirtless!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 14, 2013 2:57 pm Crazy old sensei's half-remembered life, told Millenium Actress style.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Nov 14, 2013 3:27 pm An OVA series about frenemies Yui and Kyoko and their wacky adventures before getting eaten/mindfucked by the Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Thu Nov 14, 2013 3:44 pm A show about Kensuke! I call it Guy und Eva (or something) Alternately, the section two agents that get Shinji after he runs away. The running gag/punchline: "I don't get paid enough for this."

[]:             Quote Post by Asukaner117 » Thu Nov 14, 2013 4:08 pm Well, a show about the origin of Lorenz Kiel and SEELE whould be pretty interesting i guess?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Thu Nov 14, 2013 4:12 pm The History of Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 14, 2013 4:40 pm - The history of SEELE(both their NGE and NTE incarnation, who seems to have very different stories) - Kaji's spying for the JDA(come on, James Bond in Eva, that's bound to be awesome!) - Mari's hijinks while stationed in Bethany Base : she's bored, can't pilot Unit 05 and has a metric ton of tanks around her with huge empty halls and a lot of spare time, you know that she must have done more than one craziness! - Mari and Asuka's adventures during the time skip : just imagining their first meeting with Mari having to explain to Asuka that she utterly trashed her beloved Unit 02 and after having to escape Asuka's enraged retaliation cracks me up, and that's just the beginning : how they had to learn to work along, to even support each other, how they little by little got out of their mentality of working alone, how they finally become friends and partners ready to put their life on the other's hand without any doubt, and all the awesome fights they had to make against the NS and Mark.09... come on, that would be awesome! - the last moments of the FAR civilization and their departure inside the seven Seeds as a last effort to save their race.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 14, 2013 11:47 pm Haha, nice one, TMBounty_Hunter. I remember your original post with that joke, too. I'm naturally going to propose an OVA version of my perpetually unfinished masterpiece Crying Man , the tragic tale of Dr. Akira Katsuragi's final year of life. And if that's successful, it can be expanded into a trilogy about the three CE participants. Kyoko comes next, because she's so much fun, and Yui comes last, because she's so damned hard to write for.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Nov 14, 2013 11:49 pm Damn, not sure how I forgot about him!

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Nov 15, 2013 12:13 am Reichu wrote: Kyoko comes next, because she's so much fun, and Yui comes last, because she's so damned hard to write for.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Fri Nov 15, 2013 12:17 am I wanna see Hyuga draw the Eva Manga or write "fan fics". He's geeky enough. Would be centered around him trying to think of ways for the "real life" Shinji to be all manly and stuffs.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri Nov 15, 2013 12:29 am Hyuga would write fanfics about Shinji banging Misato. You know I'm right.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 15, 2013 12:30 am Absolutely not. He'd write self-insert fics about himself banging Misato, and then throw them away in shame before rewriting them. Rinse and repeat.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri Nov 15, 2013 12:38 am Shini already is everybody's self insert.

[]:             Quote Post by Violet Shadow » Fri Nov 15, 2013 8:39 am Pen Pen clearly needs his own show; he's the perfect mascot.

[]:             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Fri Nov 15, 2013 6:40 pm Aoba's humorous attempts to form a rock band with him and his air guitar skills coming in handy merits it's own show.
